  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves processing plastic film or pellets using cryogenic pretreatment and milling techniques to study particle size distribution and properties.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A person in a lab coat and gloves adds a dark liquid from a beaker into a container.",
    "The liquid is then poured into a centrifuge tube.",
    "The centrifuge tube is placed into a centrifuge for centrifugation.",
    "After centrifugation, the supernatant is removed, leaving behind solid particles.",
    "The solid particles are then transferred to a mill.",
    "The mill is operated to grind the particles further.",
    "The resulting powder is collected and analyzed."
  ],
